form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at Deauville All Weather December 12 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Believer carrying 57.5kg at $1.40. First up last campaign second of 7 at Deauville All Weather in the LR November 26 over 1900m, a long neck behind Zaydann with 57kg at $4.50. Great chance.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start favourite; won by 0.8 len at this track March 24 over 1600m defeating Felix Aux Ormes carrying 61kg at $4.50. Before that 2nd of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on March 8 over 1600m, 2 len behind No Lunch with 55.5kg at $55. Well placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 5th of 13 at La Teste De Buch on March 21 over 1400m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Darius Cen with 56kg at $4.80. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Longchamp on May 25 over 1400m, 1.4 len behind Cacofonix with 57kg at $9.30. Strips fitter and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 56-day let-up. First-up after four months 4th in a small field at Chantilly All Weather on February 13 over 1600m, 1.4 len behind Abiat carrying 59kg at $6.80. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Chantilly in LR on October 11 over 1800m, slow going 6 len behind Nitoi carrying 57kg at $10. Will strip fitter this time and can find some form.
